subcodes.first_line: O Husayn, upon thee be My glory! The gates of utterance have been opened unto all who dwell in the realm of contingency through the key of the Name, the All-Merciful, and the gems [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حسین علیک بهائی ابواب بیان بمفتاح اسم رحمن بر اهل امکان باز شد و جواهر
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to Christians, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
